home.title: Election Monitoring
home.subtitle: System
home.description: Empowering citizens to report election irregularities and ensuring transparent, fair elections through crowdsourced monitoring and real-time analytics.
home.featuresSubtitle: Our platform provides comprehensive tools for election monitoring and reporting
home.updatesSubtitle: Stay informed about the latest developments in our election monitoring efforts
home.secureReportingDesc: Report election irregularities securely with end-to-end encryption and anonymous submission options.
home.realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Access comprehensive data visualization and analytics to track election integrity in real-time.
home.multiRoleAccessDesc: Designed for citizens, observers, analysts, and administrators with role-specific dashboards.
home.transparentMonitoringDesc: Open observation system that allows international monitors to verify election processes.
home.systemLaunchDesc: Election Monitoring System is now live and accepting reports from citizens nationwide.
home.newAnalyticsDashboardDesc: Added comprehensive analytics features for analysts to track voting patterns and anomalies.
home.observerPortalDesc: Observer login portal is now available for accredited election observers.
home.copyright: © 2025 Election Monitoring System. All rights reserved.

login.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access your account

about.title: About Election Monitoring System
about.subtitle: Empowering citizens to ensure transparent and fair elections through crowdsourced monitoring and real-time analytics.
about.missionDesc: The Election Monitoring System is designed to promote electoral transparency and accountability. We provide a secure platform for citizens, election observers, and analysts to report, track, and analyze election irregularities in real-time. Our goal is to ensure that every vote counts and that elections are conducted fairly and transparently.

citizen.reportSuccess: Your report has been submitted successfully! Our team will review it shortly.

analyst.reportsSubtitle: Analyze election data and generate insights
